overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking at night along a dirt path through grasslands, crossing a wooden torch-lit bridge with NPC guards, and continuing into the countryside. The scene features atmospheric blue-green nighttime lighting with mist and wooden medieval structures.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt trail through open grasslands toward a distant wooden bridge

tall green grass covering the open countryside
tall dark pine tree silhouetted against the night sky
wooden suspension bridge with support beams visible in the distance
flickering orange light suggesting a distant camp or settlement

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail through open grasslands at night, approaching a wooden bridge structure in the distance. The scene is illuminated by moonlight with a large pine tree visible ahead and a distant campfire glow to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden suspension bridge with torch lighting

encountering armored guard NPC carrying a torch walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the wooden bridge and walking across the planks, passing under the support structure

notable_agents.action: armored guard holding a lit torch walks past Geralt in the opposite direction

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge walkway
wooden railings with horizontal beams along the bridge sides
wooden railings with horizontal beams along the bridge sides
lit torches mounted on wooden posts illuminating the bridge
thick wooden trusses and support structure overhead

wooden palisade walls with pointed stakes visible at bridge exit

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters and crosses a wooden suspension bridge lit by torches, with mist visible below the planks. He passes an armored guard carrying a torch who walks in the opposite direction. The bridge structure creates an enclosed corridor with wooden railings and support beams, leading toward fortified walls at the far end.

events.description: exiting wooden bridge back into open grassland, passing through wooden fortification gate

agents.ego_description: stepping off the bridge onto dirt ground and continuing along the path away from the fortifications

entered.detail: scattered thin trees visible in the distant darkness

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the bridge through wooden fortification walls and continues along the dirt path through open grasslands. The bridge structure and its torches fall behind as he proceeds into the darker countryside with sparse trees visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open moonlit grassland through a torch-lit bridge corridor and back into the dark countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail under the moonlight, passing a large pine tree as a distant campfire glows to the left. As he reaches the bridge, the open landscape shifts into an enclosed wooden suspension structure where torches cast warm light over mist swirling beneath the planks and an armored guard passes in the opposite direction. The scene then opens as Geralt exits through fortified wooden walls, leaving the bridge and its lights behind. Finally, the camera follows him back onto the dirt path, moving away from the fortifications and deeper into the sparse, dark grasslands of the countryside.
